title: Logical error: Too large size (A) passed to allocator
description:
### Describe the bug
Too big `temporary_files_buffer_size` leads to the LOGICA_ERROR, should throw some validation error before attempting to allocate
### How to reproduce
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0__fuzz_7 (`c0` UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO t0__fuzz_7 VALUES (1);
SELECT DISTINCT c0 FROM t0__fuzz_7 GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ((c0)) SETTINGS max_bytes_before_external_group_by = 1, temporary_files_buffer_size = 9223372036854775806, group_by_two_level_threshold = 1
```
https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/92cd5d41-53c7-46f4-a2ee-01fc798d6b43
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1__fuzz_1 (id INTEGER, name TEXT, value DOUBLE PRECISION);
CREATE TABLE t2__fuzz_2 (key INTEGER, data INTEGER);
SELECT DISTINCT key, data FROM t2__fuzz_2 GROUP BY key, data;
key_bug_features: Too large temporary_files_buffer_size causes logical error
